# Psalms 101

## Verses (8)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | I will make a song of mercy and righteousness; to you, O Lord, will I make melody. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | I will do wisely in the way of righteousness: O when will you come to me? I will be walking in my house with a true heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | I will not put any evil thing before my eyes; I am against all turning to one side; I will not have it near me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The false heart I will send away from me: I will not have an evil-doer for a friend. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | I will put to death anyone who says evil of his neighbour secretly; the man with a high look and a heart of pride is disgusting to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | My eyes will be on those of good faith in the land, so that they may be living in my house; he who is walking in the right way will be my servant. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The worker of deceit will not come into my house; the false man will have no place before my eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Morning by morning will I put to death all the sinners in the land, so that all evil-doers may be cut off from Jerusalem. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
